name: part_013
file: tmp_【重大告知あり】新３Dお披露目？！癒月ちょこ生誕祭2026🎂 【ホロライブ⧸癒月ちょこ】 [_1PGuuEP7ps]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_013.webm

scenes.description: The final performance of the concert concludes, and Choco prepares to address the audience.
Choco's MC segment where she discusses her new song and upcoming plans.
Closing credits roll over a static image of Choco with a cake.

subtitles.original: はい！ということで、みんなどうだったかな？
subtitles.english: Hi! So, how was it everyone?

subtitles.original: 今回の新曲「キミの秒針」は...
subtitles.english: My new song, "Kimi no Byoushin" (Your Second Hand)...

subtitles.original: しどの真央様が作詞、そして二目組あつし様が作曲、編曲、
subtitles.english: ...is written by Mao Shito-sama, and composed and arranged by Atsushi Nimegumi-sama,

subtitles.original: そして編曲にはなんと加藤貴之様も加わっていただきました！
subtitles.english: and Takayuki Kato-sama even joined us for the arrangement!

subtitles.original: いや、今回は、ボイスドラマ連動企画の第一弾として...
subtitles.english: Well, this time, as the first part of a voice drama tie-in project...

subtitles.original: ストーリー全体のね、テーマソングを担うような書き下ろしの楽曲に仕上がっております。
subtitles.english: ...it's a newly written song that serves as the theme song for the entire story.

subtitles.original: まあドラマの鍵となるね、秒針というメタファーにも要注目してください。
subtitles.english: Please pay close attention to the metaphor of the "second hand," which is the key to the drama.

subtitles.original: しどさんだけではなく、
subtitles.english: Not only Shito-san,

subtitles.original: このあとね、豪華アーティストの皆様にもたくさん書いていただいたので...
subtitles.english: many wonderful artists wrote for me after this as well...

subtitles.original: 皆様リリースをお楽しみに！
subtitles.english: so everyone, please look forward to the release!

subtitles.original: こちらの「キミの秒針」は各音楽サイトは...
subtitles.english: This song "Kimi no Byoushin" will be on music sites...

subtitles.original: ちょっと間が空いちゃうんだけど、3月15日の0時から配信予定でございます。
subtitles.english: ...and while there's a bit of a gap, it's scheduled for release on March 15th at midnight.

subtitles.original: まあちょっとね、公開まで時間があくから、それまでこの配信、何度も見返してみてください。
subtitles.english: Since there's some time until the release, please watch this stream many times until then.

subtitles.original: 聴き込んでね！
subtitles.english: Listen to it carefully!

subtitles.original: そしてそして、
subtitles.english: And also,

subtitles.original: MVもね、ちょっと後日公開なので楽しみに待っててくださーい！
subtitles.english: the MV will also be released at a later date, so please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: ということで、今日のチョコの生誕ライブはどうだったかなー？
subtitles.english: So, how was Choco's birthday live today?

subtitles.original: まあこのあとは、すぐに、
subtitles.english: Well, immediately after this,

subtitles.original: 冒頭、最初の方でお披露目した、
subtitles.english: the one we showed at the very beginning...

subtitles.original: ノエルちゃんとラミィたんとの3人の「初恋大戦争」のMV公開があって、
subtitles.english: ...the MV for "Hatsukoi Daisensou" by the three of us with Noel-chan and Lamy-tan will be released.

subtitles.original: そのあとメン限で、
subtitles.english: After that, in the membership-only stream,

subtitles.original: ちょっとライブと撮影会の続きとか、ちょっとね、メン限でしか見れない...
subtitles.english: we'll have the continuation of the live and photo session, and something you can only see in membership...

subtitles.original: シチュエーションドラマとかやるので、ぜひぜひ気になる人は見に行ってくださーい！
subtitles.english: ...like a situation drama, so if you're interested, please come watch it!

subtitles.original: それではまた後でお会いしましょう！
subtitles.english: Well then, let's meet again later!

subtitles.original: おつかれーと！
subtitles.english: Otsu-kare-to!

subtitles.original: はむっ、ちゅっ！
subtitles.english: *Ham, Chu!*
